<= PLAYER_EVENT_DEDUPE_WINDOW_SIZE) return;\r\n          const evicted = deliveredOrder.shift();\r\n          if (evicted) delivered.delete(evicted);\r\n        };\r\n        const send = (event: ClientProgressEvent) => {\r\n          if (phase === \"closed\") return false;\r\n          if (event.sequence <= lastSuccessfullyDeliveredSequence || delivered.has(event.id)) return true;\r\n rememberDelivered(event.id);\r\n            lastSuccessfullyDeliveredSequence = event.sequence;\r\n            return true;\r\n          }\r\n          return false;\r\n        };\r\n        function receive(event: ClientProgressEvent) {\r\n          if (phase === \"closed\" || event.sequence <= lastSuccessfullyDeliveredSequence || delivered.has(event.id)) {\r\n            return;\r\n          }\r\n          if (phase === \"replay\") {\r\n            const current = buffered.get(event.id);\r\n            if (!current || event.sequence >= current.sequence) buffered.set(event.id, event);\r\n terminate(true);\r\n        }\r\n        const accessIsCurrent = async () =>\r\n          Boolean(\r\n            await db.playerAccess.findFirst({\r\n              where: {\r\n                id: access.id,\r\n                campaignId: access.campaignId,\r\n                OR: [{ expiresAt: null }, { expiresAt: { gt: new Date() } }],\r\n              },\r\n              select: { id: true },\r\n            }),\r\n          );\r\n        const revoke = () => {\r\n          if (isClosed()) return;\r\n          enqueue(\"event: access-revoked\\ndata: {}\\n\\n\");\r\n right.sequence || left.id.localeCompare(right.id));\r\n            for (const event of page) {\r\n              if (!send(event)) return;\r\n              buffered.delete(event.id);\r\n              durableCursor = Math.max(durableCursor, event.sequence);\r\n            }\r\n            if (durableCursor <= previousCursor) {\r\n              terminate(true);\r\n              return;\r\n            }\r\n            if (missed.length < PLAYER_EVENT_HISTORY_PAGE_SIZE) break;\r\n          }\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

## Assistant
**Timestamp:** 2026-07-21T15:30:54.358Z

The migration runner now creates a valid immutable Chronicle version for each Campaign, pins a Chronicle Session to it, maps identities/memberships and runtime state, imports ordered events and audits, and records deterministic provenance. I also added explicit canonical fields for legacy map/artifact/side-quest semantics rather than burying them in an opaque blob.

\"@/chronicle/legacy-companion-migration\";\n+\n+export class LegacyCompatibilityError extends Error {\n+  constructor(\n+    message: string,\n+    public readonly code: \"NOT_MIGRATED\" | \"PlayerProfile\" | \"PlaythroughMembership\";\n+\n+async function mapping(sourceModel: string, sourceId: string, canonicalModel: MappingModel) {\n+  return db.legacyEntityReference.findFirst({\n+    where: {\n+      sourceDomain: LEGACY_COMPANION_DOMAIN,\n+      sourceModel,\n+      sourceId,\n+      canonicalModel,\n+      migrationVersion: LEGACY_COMPANION_MIGRATION_VERSION,\n+    },\n+ title: true } });\n+  if (!campaign) return null;\n+  const [chronicle, version, session] = await Promise.all([\n+    mapping(\"Campaign\", campaign.id, \"Chronicle\"),\n+    mapping(\"Campaign\", campaign.id, \"PublishedTaleVersion\"),\n+    mapping(\"Campaign\", campaign.id, \"TaleSession\"),\n+  ]);\n+  if (!chronicle || !version || !session)\n+    throw new LegacyCompatibilityError(\n+      `Legacy Voyage ${campaign.slug} has not completed Project One Voyage migration.`,\n+      \"NOT_MIGRATED\",\n+    );\n+  return {\n+    campaignId: campaign.id,\n+    campaignSlug: campaign.slug,\n+    title: campaign.title,\n+    chronicleId: chronicle.canonicalId,\n+    versionId: version.canonicalId,\n+    sessionId: session.canonicalId,\n+  };\n+}\n+\n+async function canonicalGuestForCampaign(campaignId: string, sessionId: string, accessCodeHash: string) {\n+  const existing = await mapping(\"LegacyAccessCode\", campaignId, \"PlayerProfile\");\n+  if (existing) {\n+    const membership = await mapping(\"LegacyAccessCode\", campaignId, \"PlaythroughMembership\");\n+    if (!membership) throw new LegacyCompatibilityError(\"Legacy credential mapping is incomplete.\", \"MISSING_MAPPING\");\n+    return { playerId: existing.canonicalId, membershipId: membership.canonicalId };\n+  }\n+  return db.$transaction(async (tx) => {\n+    const raced = await tx.legacyEntityReference.findFirst({\n+      where: {\n+        sourceDomain: LEGACY_COMPANION_DOMAIN,\n+        sourceModel: \"LegacyAccessCode\",\n+        sourceId: campaignId,\n+        canonicalModel: \"PlayerProfile\",\n+        migrationVersion: LEGACY_COMPANION_MIGRATION_VERSION,\n+      },\n+    });\n+    if (raced) {\n+      const membership = await tx.legacyEntityReference.findFirst({\n+        where: {\n+          sourceDomain: LEGACY_COMPANION_DOMAIN,\n+          sourceModel: \"LegacyAccessCode\",\n+          sourceId: campaignId,\n+          canonicalModel: \"PlaythroughMembership\",\n+          migrationVersion: LEGACY_COMPANION_MIGRATION_VERSION,\n+        },\n+      });\n+      if (!membership) throw new LegacyCompatibilityError(\"Legacy credential mapping is incomplete.\", \"MISSING_MAPPING\");\n+      return { playerId: raced.canonicalId, membershipId: membership.canonicalId };\n+    }\n+    const session = await tx.taleSession.findUniqueOrThrow({ where: { id: sessionId } });\n+    const player = await tx.playerProfile.create({\n+      data: {\n+        displayName: \"Legacy guest\",\n+        preferences: JSON.stringify({ legacyCredential: \"exchanged\" }),\n+      },\n+    });\n+    const membership = await tx.playthroughMembership.create({\n+      data: {\n+        playthroughId: sessionId,\n+        playerProfileId: player.id,\n+        role: \"PLAYER\",\n+        status: session.status === \"COMPLETED\" ? \"COMPLETED_MEMBER\" : \"ACTIVE_MEMBER\",\n+        joinedAt: new Date(),\n+        completedAt: session.status === \"COMPLETED\" ? session.completedAt ?? new Date() : null,\n+      },\n+    });\n+    const referenceData = {\n+      sourceDomain: LEGACY_COMPANION_DOMAIN,\n+      sourceModel: \"LegacyAccessCode\",\n+      sourceId: campaignId,\n+      migrationVersion: LEGACY_COMPANION_MIGRATION_VERSION,\n+      sourceChecksum: accessCodeHash,\n+    };\n+    await tx.legacyEntityReference.create({\n+      data: { ...referenceData, canonicalModel: \"PlayerProfile\", canonicalId: player.id },\n+    });\n+    await tx.legacyEntityReference.create({\n+      data: { ...referenceData, canonicalModel: \"PlaythroughMembership\", canonicalId: membership.id },\n+    });\n+    await tx.platformAuditEvent.create({\n+      data: {\n+        actorType: \"LEGACY_CREDENTIAL\",\n+        action: \"LEGACY_ACCESS_CODE_EXCHANGED\",\n+        resourceType: \"CHRONICLE_SESSION\",\n+        resourceId: sessionId,\n+        correlationId: `legacy-access-code:${campaignId}`,\n+        metadata: JSON.stringify({ sourceDomain: LEGACY_COMPANION_DOMAIN, sourceCampaignId: campaignId }),\n+      },\n+    });\n+    return { playerId: player.id, membershipId: membership.id };\n+  });\n+}\n+\n+/**\n+ * Compatibility exchange only. The legacy code proves campaign access, then a\n+ * new canonical identity session is issued. No legacy access or session row is\n+ * written here.\n+ */\n+export async function exchangeLegacyAccessCode(campaignSlug: string, accessCode: string) {\n+  const campaign = await db.campaign.findUnique({\n+    where: { slug: campaignSlug },\n+    select: { id: true, accessCodeHash: true },\n+  });\n+  if (!campaign || !(await bcrypt.compare(accessCode, campaign.accessCodeHash)))\n+    throw new LegacyCompatibilityError(\"That invitation could not be recognized.\", \"INVALID_CREDENTIAL\");\n+  const resolved = await resolveLegacyCampaign(campaignSlug);\n+  if (!resolved) throw new LegacyCompatibilityError(\"That invitation could not be recognized.\", \"INVALID_CREDENTIAL\");\n+  const guest = await canonicalGuestForCampaign(campaign.id, resolved.sessionId, campaign.accessCodeHash);\n+  const csrfToken = await createPlayerIdentitySession(guest.playerId);\n+  return { ...resolved, playerId: guest.playerId, csrfToken };\n+}\n+\n+export async function requireLegacyCompatibilityAccess(campaignSlug: string) {\n+  const resolved = await resolveLegacyCampaign(campaignSlug);\n+  if (!resolved) return null;\n+  const identity = await requirePlayerIdentity();\n+  if (!identity || !(await playerCanAccessPlaythrough(resolved.sessionId, identity.playerProfileId))) return null;\n+  return { ...resolved, playerId: identity.playerProfileId, csrfToken: identity.csrfToken };\n+}\n*** End Patch";

(context) => {\n          if (\n            context.hostId !== accessHost.current?.hostId ||\n            context.hostKind !== accessHost.current?.kind ||\n            context.fallback !== accessFallback ||\n            context.signal?.aborted\n          ) {\n            return { completed: false, readable: false, reason: \"access-fallback-context-rejected\" };\n          }\n          try {\n            fallbackOperationResult = await authenticate();\n            fallbackVerified = publishReadableStatus(accessSuccessStatus);\n            return fallbackVerified\n              ? { completed: true, readable: true, semanticState: accessFinalState }\n              : { completed: false, readable: false, reason: \"access-fallback-not-readable\" };\n          } catch {\n            fallbackOperationFailed = true;\n            return { completed: false, readable: false, reason: \"access-fallback-operation-failed\" };\n          }\n        },\n      });\n\n      const operationPresented =\n        (receipt.outcome === \"presented\" || receipt.outcome === \"skipped-by-user\") &&\n        receipt.operationResult?.ok === true &&\n        receipt.finalSemanticState === accessFinalState;\n      const approvedFallbackPresented =\n        receipt.outcome === \"presented-fallback\" &&\n        receipt.fallbackUsed === accessFallback &&\n        receipt.finalSemanticState === accessFinalState &&\n        fallbackVerified &&\n        fallbackOperationResult?.ok === true;\n\n      if (operationPresented || approvedFallbackPresented) {\n        setAccessState(\"accepted\");\n        if (!approvedFallbackPresented) publishReadableStatus(accessSuccessStatus);\n        try {\n          await handOffRoute(controller.signal);\n        } catch {\n          restoreInteractiveFailure(\n            controller,\n            \"Invitation accepted, but the Voyage Journal could not be opened. Your access is preserved. Try again.\",\n          );\n        }\n      } else if (mounted.current && !controller.signal.aborted) {\n        restoreInteractiveFailure(\n          controller,\n          receipt.outcome === \"runtime-failed\" || fallbackOperationFailed ? operationError : presentationAccessError,\n        );\n      }\n    } catch {\n      if (mounted.current && !controller.signal.aborted) {\n        restoreInteractiveFailure(controller, operationError);\n      }\n    } finally {\n      // A successful accepted pose remains held and single-flight until route unmount.\n      if (submitRun.current === controller && (!mounted.current || controller.signal.aborted)) submitRun.current = null;\n    }\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <main\n      ref={root}\n      className=\"access-scene\"\n      data-motion-mode={mode}\n      data-access-state={accessState}\n      data-access-operation={operationKey}\n    >\n      <div className=\"chart-room-table\" aria-hidden=\"true\">\n        <i className=\"table-compass\" />\n        <i className=\"table-key\" />\n        <i className=\"table-coin\" />\n      </div>\n      <LottieEffect\n        asset={lottieAssets.moonlitWaves}\n        mode={mode}\n        label=\"Reflected tide light across the invitation table\"\n        className=\"access-tide-light\"\n      />\n      <LottieEffect\n        asset={lottieAssets.rollingFog}\n        mode={mode}\n        label=\"A restrained line of fog at the chart-room edge\"\n        className=\"access-edge-fog\"\n      />\n      <SceneHost\n        kind=\"access\"\n        hostKey={`legacy-player-access:${campaignSlug}`}\n        className=\"access-cinematic-boundary\"\n        data-access-cinematic-geometry=\"host\"\n        aria-hidden=\"true\"\n        style={{\n          position: \"absolute\",\n          zIndex: 11,\n          inset: 0,\n          display: \"grid\",\n          placeItems: \"center\",\n          pointerEvents: \"none\",\n        }}\n      >\n        <AccessHostBridge onReady={(host) => (accessHost.current = host)} mode={mode} />\n      </SceneHost>\n      <section className=\"access-card\" aria-labelledby=\"invitation-title\">\n        <p className=\"eyebrow\">Private invitation</p>\n        <h1 id=\"invitation-title\">Confirm your invitation</h1>\n        <p>\n          Enter the phrase provided by your Captain. const patch = "*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: Forever-Treasure-Integration/src/compatibility/legacy-quartermaster.ts\n+import { randomUUID } from \"node:crypto\";\n+import type { AdminCommand } from \"@/domain/admin\";\n+import { db } from \"@/lib/db\";\n+import { publishTaleSessionEvent } from \"@/lib/events\";\n+import { parseJsonArray, parseJsonObject, parsePublishedSnapshot, type JsonObject } from \"@/chronicle/types\";\n+import { resolveLegacyCampaign } from \"@/compatibility/legacy-companion\";\n+\n+export class LegacyQuartermasterConflict extends Error {\n+  constructor(\n+    message: string,\n+    public readonly code: \"STALE_SEQUENCE\" | \"SESSION_PAUSED\" | \"NOT_FOUND\" | \"UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND\",\n+  ) {\n+    super(message);\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+type LegacyCommandInput = {\n+  command: AdminCommand;\n+  campaignSlug: string;\n+  expectedSequence: number;\n+  idempotencyKey: string;\n+  targetKey?: string;\n+  payload: Record<string, unknown>;\n+  reason?: string;\n+};\n+\n+type LegacyVariables = JsonObject & {\n+  legacy?: JsonObject & { chapters?: Record<string, string>; sideQuests?: Record<string, JsonObject>; routes?: Record<string, string> };\n+};\n+\n+const eventTypeFor: Partial<Record<AdminCommand, string>> = {\n+  PREPARE_CHAPTER: \"CHAPTER_PREPARED\",\n+  RELEASE_CHAPTER: \"CHAPTER_RELEASED\",\n+  MARK_SOLVED: \"CHAPTER_SOLVED\",\n+  COMPLETE_CHAPTER: \"CHAPTER_REVEAL_COMPLETED\",\n+  RELEASE_HINT: \"HINT_RELEASED\",\n+  RELEASE_NEXT_HINT: \"HINT_RELEASED\",\n+  REVEAL_MAP: \"MAP_LOCATION_REVEALED\",\n+  REVEAL_ROUTE: \"MAP_ROUTE_REVEALED\",\n+  AWARD_ARTIFACT: \"ARTIFACT_AWARDED\",\n+  REVEAL_ARTIFACT_SILHOUETTE: \"ARTIFACT_SILHOUETTE_REVEALED\",\n+  CONNECT_ARTIFACTS: \"ARTIFACT_CONNECTED\",\n+  DISCOVER_SIDE_QUEST: \"SIDE_QUEST_DISCOVERED\",\n+  UPDATE_SIDE_QUEST: \"SIDE_QUEST_UPDATED\",\n+  COMPLETE_SIDE_QUEST: \"SIDE_QUEST_COMPLETED\",\n+  ADVANCE_SIDE_QUEST: \"SIDE_QUEST_UPDATED\",\n+  ADD_JOURNAL_ANNOTATION: \"JOURNAL_ANNOTATION_ADDED\",\n+  ADD_LOG_ENTRY: \"PLAYER_LOG_ENTRY_ADDED\",\n+  RELEASE_JOURNAL_ENTRY: \"NARRATIVE_MESSAGE_RELEASED\",\n+  TEASE_FINALE: \"FINALE_TEASED\",\n+  UPDATE_FINALE_REQUIREMENT: \"FINALE_REQUIREMENT_UPDATED\",\n+  PAUSE: \"CAMPAIGN_PAUSED\",\n+  RESUME: \"CAMPAIGN_RESUMED\",\n+  REQUEST_RECONCILIATION: \"PLAYER_RECONCILIATION_REQUESTED\",\n+};\n+\n+function legacyState(raw: string): LegacyVariables {\n+  const parsed = parseJsonObject(raw) as LegacyVariables;\n+  const legacy = (parsed.legacy ?? {}) as JsonObject;\n+  parsed.legacy = legacy;\n+  if (!legacy.chapters || typeof legacy.chapters !== \"object\" || Array.isArray(legacy.chapters)) legacy.chapters = {};\n+  if (!legacy.sideQuests || typeof legacy.sideQuests !== \"object\" || Array.isArray(legacy.sideQuests)) legacy.sideQuests = {};\n+  if (!legacy.routes || typeof legacy.routes !== \"object\" || Array.isArray(legacy.routes)) legacy.routes = {};\n+  return parsed;\n+}\n+\n+function chapterForCommand(snapshot: ReturnType<typeof parsePublishedSnapshot>, variables: LegacyVariables, command: AdminCommand) {\n+  const chapters = (variables.legacy?.chapters ?? {}) as Record<string, string>;\n+  if (command === \"PREPARE_CHAPTER\")\n+    return snapshot.chapters.find((chapter) => [\"LOCKED\", \"TEASER\"].includes(chapters[String(chapter.orderIndex)] ?? \"LOCKED\"));\n+  if (command === \"RELEASE_CHAPTER\")\n+    return snapshot.chapters.find((chapter) => (chapters[String(chapter.orderIndex)] ?? \"LOCKED\") === \"READY\");\n+  return [...snapshot.chapters]\n+    .reverse()\n+    .find((chapter) => [\"ACTIVE\", \"SOLVED\", \"COMPLETE\"].includes(chapters[String(chapter.orderIndex)] ?? \"LOCKED\"));\n+}\n+\n+function receipt(event: { id: string; eventType: string; sequence: number; createdAt: Date }, correlationId: string) {\n+  return {\n+    kind: \"PROGRESSION_EVENT\" as const,\n+    event: {\n+      id: event.id,\n+      type: event.eventType,\n+      sequence: event.sequence,\n+      payload: {},\n+      releaseAt: event.createdAt.toISOString(),\n+    },\n+    correlationId,\n+    persistence: \"COMMITTED\" as const,\n+    publication: \"PROCESS_PUBLISHED\" as const,\n+    delivery: \"PUBLISHED\" as const,\n+    deliveryScope: \"PROCESS_SUBSCRIBERS_ONLY\" as const,\n+    playerDelivery: \"UNCONFIRMED\" as const,\n+    playerPresentation: \"UNCONFIRMED\" as const,\n+    playerAcknowledgment: \"UNCONFIRMED\" as const,\n+    playerEvent: { id: event.id, type: event.eventType, sequence: event.sequence },\n+  };\n+}\n+\n+/**\n+ * Adapter for Quartermaster request shapes. It resolves the historical Campaign\n+ * only as an ID lookup; all decisions, sequence increments, events, reveals,\n+ * inventory and audit writes are canonical Chronicle-session writes.\n+ */\n+export async function executeLegacyQuartermasterCommand(\n+  input: LegacyCommandInput,\n+  userId: string,\n+  correlationId = randomUUID(),\n+) {\n+  const resolved = await resolveLegacyCampaign(input.campaignSlug);\n+  if (!resolved) throw new LegacyQuartermasterConflict(\"This Voyage is unavailable.\", \"NOT_FOUND\");\n+  const key = `legacy-quartermaster:${resolved.sessionId}:${input.idempotencyKey}`;\n+  const event = await db.$transaction(async (tx) => {\n+    const prior = await tx.taleSessionEvent.findUnique({ where: { idempotencyKey: key } });\n+    if (prior) return prior;\n+    const session = await tx.taleSession.findUniqueOrThrow({ where: { id: resolved.sessionId }, include: { version: true } });\n+    if (session.currentSequence !== input.expectedSequence)\n+      throw new LegacyQuartermasterConflict(\n+        `Chronicle state changed from sequence ${input.expectedSequence} to ${session.currentSequence}. Refresh Captain's Console.`,\n+        \"STALE_SEQUENCE\",\n+      );\n+    if (session.status === \"PAUSED\" && ![\"RESUME\", \"REQUEST_RECONCILIATION\"].includes(input.command))\n+      throw new LegacyQuartermasterConflict(\"This Chronicle Session is paused. Resume it before releasing progression.\", \"SESSION_PAUSED\");\n+    const type = eventTypeFor[input.command];\n+    if (!type || input.command === \"UNDO_LAST\")\n+      throw new LegacyQuartermasterConflict(\n+        \"This historical command requires the canonical Captain rollback control.\",\n+        \"UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND\",\n+      );\n+    if (!session.version) throw new LegacyQuartermasterConflict(\"This Chronicle Session has no published version.\", \"NOT_FOUND\");\n+    const snapshot = parsePublishedSnapshot(session.version.contentSnapshot);\n+    const variables = legacyState(session.variables);\n+    const inventory = parseJsonArray<string>(session.inventory);\n+    let currentBlockId = session.currentBlockId;\n+    let currentChapterId = session.currentChapterId;\n+    let status = session.status;\n+    let reveal: { contentType: string; contentKey: string } | null = null;\n+    const payload: JsonObject = { command: input.command, targetKey: input.targetKey ?? null };\n+    const chapter = chapterForCommand(snapshot, variables, input.command);\n+\n+    if ([\"PREPARE_CHAPTER\", \"RELEASE_CHAPTER\", \"MARK_SOLVED\", \"COMPLETE_CHAPTER\"].includes(input.command)) {\n+      if (!chapter) throw new LegacyQuartermasterConflict(\"No matching imported Chapter is available.\", \"NOT_FOUND\");\n+      const state =\n+        input.command === \"PREPARE_CHAPTER\"\n+          ? \"READY\"\n+          : input.command === \"RELEASE_CHAPTER\"\n+            ? \"ACTIVE\"\n+            : input.command === \"MARK_SOLVED\"\n+              ? \"SOLVED\"\n+              : \"COMPLETE\";\n+      (variables.legacy!.chapters as Record<string, string>)[String(chapter.orderIndex)] = state;\n+      if (input.command === \"RELEASE_CHAPTER\") {\n+        currentChapterId = chapter.id;\n+        currentBlockId = chapter.entryBlockId;\n+        if (chapter.entryBlockId) reveal = { contentType: \"BLOCK\", contentKey: chapter.entryBlockId };\n+      }\n+      payload.chapterId = chapter.id;\n+      payload.chapterState = state;\n+    } else if (input.command === \"PAUSE\" || input.command === \"RESUME\") {\n+      status = input.command === \"PAUSE\" ? \"PAUSED\" : \"ACTIVE\";\n+    } else if (input.command === \"REVEAL_MAP\" || input.command === \"REVEAL_ROUTE\") {\n+      const contentKey = input.targetKey ?? \"default\";\n+      reveal = { contentType: input.command === \"REVEAL_MAP\" ? \"map-location\" : \"map-route\", contentKey };\n+      if (input.command === \"REVEAL_ROUTE\") (variables.legacy!.routes as Record<string, string>)[contentKey] = \"REVEALED\";\n+    } else if ([\"AWARD_ARTIFACT\", \"REVEAL_ARTIFACT_SILHOUETTE\", \"CONNECT_ARTIFACTS\"].includes(input.command)) {\n+      const artifact = await tx.taleArtifact.findFirst({\n+        where: { taleId: session.taleId, ...(input.targetKey ? { legacyKey: input.targetKey } : {}) },\n+        orderBy: { sortOrder: \"asc\" },\n+      });\n+      if (!artifact) throw new LegacyQuartermasterConflict(\"No mapped Artifact is available.\", \"NOT_FOUND\");\n+      reveal = { contentType: \"artifact\", contentKey: artifact.legacyKey ?? artifact.id };\n+      if (input.command === \"AWARD_ARTIFACT\" && !inventory.includes(artifact.id)) inventory.push(artifact.id);\n+      payload.artifactId = artifact.id;\n+    } else if ([\"DISCOVER_SIDE_QUEST\", \"UPDATE_SIDE_QUEST\", \"COMPLETE_SIDE_QUEST\", \"ADVANCE_SIDE_QUEST\"].includes(input.command)) {\n+      const quest = await tx.taleSideQuest.findFirst({\n+        where: { taleId: session.taleId, ...(input.targetKey ? { legacyKey: input.targetKey } : {}) },\n+        orderBy: { legacyKey: \"asc\" },\n+      });\n+      if (!quest) throw new LegacyQuartermasterConflict(\"No mapped side quest is available.\", \"NOT_FOUND\");\n+      const questState =\n+        input.command === \"DISCOVER_SIDE_QUEST\"\n+          ? \"DISCOVERED\"\n+          : input.command === \"COMPLETE_SIDE_QUEST\"\n+            ? \"COMPLETE\"\n+            : \"ACTIVE\";\n+      (variables.legacy!.sideQuests as Record<string, JsonObject>)[quest.legacyKey] = { state: questState };\n+      reveal = { contentType: \"side-quest\", contentKey: quest.legacyKey };\n+      payload.sideQuestKey = quest.legacyKey;\n+      payload.sideQuestState = questState;\n+    } else if (input.command === \"TEASE_FINALE\" || input.command === \"UPDATE_FINALE_REQUIREMENT\") {\n+      variables.legacy = { ...variables.legacy, finaleState: input.command === \"TEASE_FINALE\" ? \"TEASED\" : \"REQUIREMENTS_PARTIAL\" };\n+    } else if (input.command === \"ADD_JOURNAL_ANNOTATION\" || input.command === \"ADD_LOG_ENTRY\" || input.command === \"RELEASE_JOURNAL_ENTRY\") {\n+      payload.value = typeof input.payload.value === \"string\" ? input.payload.value : null;\n+    }\n+\n+    const guarded = await tx.taleSession.updateMany({\n+      where: { id: session.id, currentSequence: input.expectedSequence },\n+      data: {\n+        currentSequence: { increment: 1 },\n+        status,\n+        currentBlockId,\n+        currentChapterId,\n+        variables: JSON.stringify(variables),\n+        inventory: JSON.stringify(inventory),\n+      },\n+    });\n+    if (guarded.count !== 1)\n+      throw new LegacyQuartermasterConflict(\"Another Captain command was saved first. Refresh before retrying.\", \"STALE_SEQUENCE\");\n+    const updated = await tx.taleSession.findUniqueOrThrow({ where: { id: session.id }, select: { currentSequence: true } });\n+    if (reveal)\n+      await tx.revealState.upsert({\n+        where: { playthroughId_contentType_contentKey: { playthroughId: session.id, ...reveal } },\n+        update: {},\n+        create: { playthroughId: session.id, ...reveal, revealedBy: userId },\n+      });\n+    const created = await tx.taleSessionEvent.create({\n+      data: {\n+        sessionId: session.id,\n+        publishedVersionId: session.publishedVersionId!,\n+        blockId: currentBlockId,\n+        eventType: type,\n+        sourceType: \"legacy-quartermaster-adapter\",\n+        sourceId: userId,\n+        idempotencyKey: key,\n+        payload: JSON.stringify(payload),\n+        sequence: updated.currentSequence,\n+        correlationId,\n+      },\n+    });\n+    await tx.platformAuditEvent.create({\n+      data: {\n+        actorType: \"CAPTAIN\",\n+        actorId: userId,\n+        action: `LEGACY_QUARTERMASTER_${input.command}`,\n+        resourceType: \"CHRONICLE_SESSION\",\n+        resourceId: session.id,\n+        correlationId,\n+        metadata: JSON.stringify({ adapter: \"legacy-quartermaster\", targetKey: input.targetKey ?? null }),\n+      },\n+    });\n+    return created;\n+  });\n+  publishTaleSessionEvent(resolved.sessionId, {\n+    id: event.id,\n+    eventType: event.eventType,\n+    sequence: event.sequence,\n+    createdAt: event.createdAt.toISOString(),\n+  });\n+  return receipt(event, correlationId);\n+}\n*** End Patch";
const r = await tools.apply_patch(patch);text(String(r));

Refresh Captain's Console and review the action.\" },\n      { status: 403 },\n    );\n  const parsed = stageSchema.safeParse(await request.json().catch(() => null));\n  if (!parsed.success)\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"The prepared Voyage action is incomplete. Review it and try again.\" },\n      { status: 400 },\n    );\n  try {\n    const staged = await stageAdminCommand(parsed.data, session.userId);\n    return NextResponse.json({ staged, persistence: \"COMMITTED\" });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      {\n        error:\n          error instanceof Error\n            ? error.message\n            : \"The Voyage action could not be prepared. No progress has changed. Review the Voyage and try again.\",\n      },\n      { status: 409 },\n    );\n  }\n}\n\r\n--- Forever-Treasure-Integration\\src\\app\\api\\player\\[campaignSlug]\\presence\\route.ts ---\r\nimport { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { z } from \"zod\";\nimport { db } from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requirePlayer } from \"@/lib/security\";\n\nconst presenceSchema = z.object({\n  deviceId: z.string().uuid(),\n  route: z.string().max(255),\n  visibility: z.enum([\"visible\", \"hidden\"]),\n  acknowledgedSequence: z.number().int().nonnegative(),\n  disconnected: z.boolean().optional(),\n});\n\nexport async function POST(request: Request, context: { params: Promise<{ campaignSlug: string }> }) {\n  const { campaignSlug } = await context.params;\n  const access = await requirePlayer(campaignSlug);\n  if (!access) return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Player access required.\" }, { status: 401 });\n  const parsed = presenceSchema.safeParse(await request.json().catch(() => null));\n  if (!parsed.success) return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid presence update.\" }, { status: 400 });\n  const now = new Date();\n  await db.$transaction([\n    db.playerAccess.update({ where: { id: access.id }, data: { lastSeenAt: now } }),\n    db.playerPresence.upsert({\n      where: { campaignId_deviceId: { campaignId: access.campaignId, deviceId: parsed.data.deviceId } },\n      update: {\n        route: parsed.data.route,\n        visibility: parsed.data.visibility,\n        acknowledgedSequence: parsed.data.acknowledgedSequence,\n        lastHeartbeatAt: now,\n        disconnectedAt: parsed.data.disconnected ? now : null,\n      },\n      create: {\n        campaignId: access.campaignId,\n        playerAccessId: access.id,\n        deviceId: parsed.data.deviceId,\n        route: parsed.data.route,\n        visibility: parsed.data.visibility,\n        acknowledgedSequence: parsed.data.acknowledgedSequence,\n        disconnectedAt: parsed.data.disconnected ? now : null,\n      },\n    }),\n  ]);\n  return NextResponse.json({ recordedAt: now, state: parsed.data.disconnected ? \"DISCONNECTED\" : \"CONNECTED\" });\n}\n\r\n--- Forever-Treasure-Integration\\src\\app\\api\\player\\[campaignSlug]\\preferences\\route.ts ---\r\nimport { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { z } from \"zod\";\nimport { db } from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requirePlayer } from \"@/lib/security\";\n\nconst preferences = z.object({\n  muted: z.boolean(),\n  masterVolume: z.number().min(0).max(1),\n  ambientVolume: z.number().min(0).max(1),\n  effectsVolume: z.number().min(0).max(1),\n  motionMode: z.enum([\"SYSTEM\", \"FULL\", \"GENTLE\", \"REDUCED\"]),\n  textScale: z.number().min(0.85).max(1.5),\n  ambientEffects: z.boolean(),\n  textureIntensity: z.number().min(0).max(1),\n  fullscreenPreferred: z.boolean(),\n});\n\nasync function accessFor(campaignSlug: string) {\n  return requirePlayer(campaignSlug);\n}\n\nexport async function GET(_: Request, context: { params: Promise<{ campaignSlug: string }> }) {\n  const { campaignSlug } = await context.params;\n  const access = await accessFor(campaignSlug);\n  if (!access) return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invitation required.\" }, { status: 401 });\n  const value = await db.audioPreference.findUnique({ where: { playerAccessId: access.id } });\n  return NextResponse.json(\n    value ?? {\n      muted: false,\n      masterVolume: 0.45,\n      ambientVolume: 0.25,\n      effectsVolume: 0.55,\n      motionMode: \"SYSTEM\",\n      textScale: 1,\n      ambientEffects: true,\n      textureIntensity: 1,\n      fullscreenPreferred: false,\n    },\n  );\n}\n\nexport async function PUT(request: Request, context: { params: Promise<{ campaignSlug: string }> }) {\n  const { campaignSlug } = await context.params;\n  const access = await accessFor(campaignSlug);\n  if (!access) return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invitation required.\" }, { status: 401 });\n  const parsed = preferences.safeParse(await request.json().catch(() => null));\n  if (!parsed.success)\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Those companion preferences are not valid.\" }, { status: 400 });\n  const value = await db.audioPreference.upsert({\n    where: { playerAccessId: access.id },\n    update: parsed.data,\n    create: { playerAccessId: access.id, ...parsed.data },\n  });\n  return NextResponse.json(value);\n}\n\r\n--- Forever-Treasure-Integration\\src\\app\\api\\player\\[campaignSlug]\\viewed\\route.ts ---\r\nimport { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { z } from \"zod\";\nimport { playerPresentationEventTypes } from \"@/domain/visibility\";\nimport { db } from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requirePlayer } from \"@/lib/security\";\n\nconst eventIdSchema = z.string().min(8).max(128);\nconst deviceIdSchema = z.string().uuid();\n\nconst ceremonySchema = z.object({\n  eventId: eventIdSchema,\n  deviceId: deviceIdSchema,\n});\n\nconst ceremonyBatchSchema = z.object({\n  eventIds: z.array(eventIdSchema).min(1).max(100),\n  deviceId: z.string().uuid(),\n});\n\nconst schema = z.union([\n  ceremonySchema,\n  z.object({\n    contentType: z.enum([\"chapter\", \"hint\", \"annotation\", \"map\", \"route\", \"artifact\", \"quest\", \"log\", \"finale\"]),\n    contentKeys: z.array(z.string().min(1).max(128)).min(1).max(100),\n  }),\n]);\n\nasync function eligiblePlayerPresentation(campaignId: string, eventId: string) {\n  return db.progressEvent.findFirst({\n    where: {\n      id: eventId,\n      campaignId,\n      type: { in: [...playerPresentationEventTypes] },\n      releaseAt: { lte: new Date() },\n    },\n    select: { id: true, type: true },\n  });\n}\n\nasync function eligiblePlayerPresentations(campaignId: string, eventIds: string[]) {\n  return db.progressEvent.findMany({\n    where: {\n      id: { in: eventIds },\n      campaignId,\n      type: { in: [...playerPresentationEventTypes] },\n      releaseAt: { lte: new Date() },\n    },\n    select: { id: true },\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function GET(request: Request, context: { params: Promise<{ campaignSlug: string }> }) {\n  const { campaignSlug } = await context.params;\n  const access = await requirePlayer(campaignSlug);\n  if (!access) return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invitation required.\" }, { status: 401 });\n  const url = new URL(request.url);\n  // Batch contract: repeat the plural key, for example\n  // `?deviceId=<uuid>&eventIds=<id-1>&eventIds=<id-2>`. The singular\n  // `eventId` form below retains its existing response and 409 semantics.\n  if (url.searchParams.has(\"eventIds\")) {\n    if (url.searchParams.has(\"eventId\")) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid acknowledgement query.\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n    const parsedBatch = ceremonyBatchSchema.safeParse({\n      eventIds: url.searchParams.getAll(\"eventIds\"),\n      deviceId: url.searchParams.get(\"deviceId\"),\n    });\n    if (!parsedBatch.success) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid acknowledgement query.\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n    const requestedEventIds = [...new Set(parsedBatch.data.eventIds)];\n    const eligible = await eligiblePlayerPresentations(access.campaignId, requestedEventIds);\n    const eligibleIds = new Set(eligible.map((event) => event.id));\n    const viewed = await db.viewedCeremony.findMany({\n      where: {\n        campaignId: access.campaignId,\n        deviceId: parsedBatch.data.deviceId,\n        eventId: { in: [...eligibleIds] },\n      },\n      select: { eventId: true },\n    });\n    const acknowledgedEventIds = [...new Set(viewed.map((receipt) => receipt.eventId))]\n      .filter((eventId) => eligibleIds.has(eventId))\n      .sort((left, right) => left.localeCompare(right));\n    return NextResponse.json({ acknowledgedEventIds });\n  }\n  const parsed = ceremonySchema.safeParse({\n    eventId: url.searchParams.get(\"eventId\"),\n    deviceId: url.searchParams.get(\"deviceId\"),\n  });\n  if (!parsed.success) return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid acknowledgement.\" }, { status: 400 });\n  const event = await eligiblePlayerPresentation(access.campaignId, parsed.data.eventId);\n  if (!event) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Presentation is not eligible for acknowledgement.\" }, { status: 409 });\n  }\n  const viewed = await db.viewedCeremony.findUnique({\n    where: { campaignId_deviceId_eventId: { campaignId: access.campaignId, ...parsed.data } },\n    select: { id: true },\n  });\n  return NextResponse.json({ acknowledged: Boolean(viewed) });\n}\n\nexport async function POST(request: Request, context: { params: Promise<{ campaignSlug: string }> }) {\n  const { campaignSlug } = await context.params;\n  const access = await requirePlayer(campaignSlug);\n  if (!access) return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invitation required.\" }, { status: 401 });\n  const parsed = schema.safeParse(await request.json().catch(() => null));\n  if (!parsed.success) return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid acknowledgement.\" }, { status: 400 });\n  if (\"eventId\" in parsed.data) {\n    const event = await eligiblePlayerPresentation(access.campaignId, parsed.data.eventId);\n    if (!event) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Presentation is not eligible for acknowledgement.\" }, { status: 409 });\n    }\n    await db.viewedCeremony.upsert({\n      where: { campaignId_deviceId_eventId: { campaignId: access.campaignId, ...parsed.data } },\n      update: {},\n      create: { campaignId: access.campaignId, ...parsed.data },\n    });\n  } else {\n    const { contentType, contentKeys } = parsed.data;\n    await db.$transaction(\n      contentKeys.map((contentKey) =>\n        db.viewedContent.upsert({\n          where: { playerAccessId_contentType_contentKey: { playerAccessId: access.id, contentType, contentKey } },\n          update: { viewedAt: new Date() },\n          create: { playerAccessId: access.id, contentType, contentKey },\n        }),\n      ),\n    );\n  }\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

Number(raw) : 0;\n+}\n+\n+function playerEvent(event: { id: string; eventType: string; sequence: number; payload: string; createdAt: Date }) {\n+  let payload: Record<string, unknown> = {};\n+  try {\n+    const parsed: unknown = JSON.parse(event.payload);\n+    if (parsed && typeof parsed === \"object\" && !Array.isArray(parsed)) payload = parsed as Record<string, unknown>;\n+  } catch {}\n+  return { id: event.id, type: event.eventType, sequence: event.sequence, payload, releaseAt: event.createdAt.toISOString() };\n+}\n+\n+export async function GET(request: Request, context: { params: Promise<{ campaignSlug: string }> }) {\n+  const access = await requireLegacyCompatibilityAccess((await context.params).campaignSlug);\n+  if (!access) return new Response(\"Invitation required.\", { status: 401 });\n+  const requested = cursor(request);\n+  const encoder = new TextEncoder();\n+  let close = () => undefined;\n+  const stream = new ReadableStream({\n+    async start(controller) {\n+      let last = requested;\n+      const send = (event: { id: string; eventType: string; sequence: number; payload: string; createdAt: Date }) => {\n+        if (event.sequence <= last) return;\n+        last = event.sequence;\n+        controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(`id: ${event.sequence}\\nevent: progression\\ndata: ${JSON.stringify(playerEvent(event))}\\n\\n`));\n+      };\n+      const historical = await db.taleSessionEvent.findMany({\n+        where: { sessionId: access.sessionId, sequence: { gt: requested } },\n+        orderBy: { sequence: \"asc\" },\n+        take: 250,\n+      });\n+      for (const event of historical) send(event);\n+      const channel = `tale-session:${access.sessionId}`;\n+      const listener = async (incoming: { id: string; eventType: string; sequence: number; createdAt: string }) => {\n+        const event = await db.taleSessionEvent.findUnique({ where: { id: incoming.id } });\n+        if (event) send(event);\n+      };\n+      eventBus.on(channel, listener);\n+      const heartbeat = setInterval(() => controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(\": tide connected\\n\\n\")), 15_000);\n+      close = () => {\n+        clearInterval(heartbeat);\n+        eventBus.off(channel, listener);\n+        try {\n+          controller.close();\n+        } catch {}\n+      };\n+      request.signal.addEventListener(\"abort\", close, { once: true });\n+    },\n+    cancel() {\n+      close();\n+    },\n+  });\n+  return new Response(stream, {\n+    headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"text/event-stream\", \"Cache-Control\": \"no-cache, no-transform\", Connection: \"keep-alive\" },\n+  });\n+}\n*** End Patch";

results.push(...(await filesWithin(candidate)));\n+    else if (textExtensions.has(path.extname(entry.name))) results.push(candidate);\n+  }\n+  return results;\n+}\n+\n+export async function const patch = "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: Forever-Treasure-Integration/src/server/admin-command.ts\n@@\n import { resolveLegacyCampaign } from \"@/compatibility/legacy-companion\";\n+import { getTaleSessionState } from \"@/chronicle/progression\";\n@@\n export async function previewAdminCommand(input: Omit<Input, \"idempotencyKey\">) {\n+  const resolved = await resolveLegacyCampaign(input.campaignSlug);\n+  if (!resolved) throw new CommandConflict(\"This Voyage is unavailable.\", \"NOT_FOUND\");\n+  const state = await getTaleSessionState(resolved.sessionId, undefined, true);\n+  const prerequisites: string[] = [];\n+  if (state.session.currentSequence !== input.expectedSequence)\n+    prerequisites.push(\"Captain's Console state is stale. Refresh before continuing.\");\n+  if (state.session.status === \"PAUSED\" && ![\"RESUME\", \"REQUEST_RECONCILIATION\"].includes(input.command))\n+    prerequisites.push(\"Resume the Chronicle Session first.\");\n+  return {\n+    preview: true,\n+    watermark: \"PREVIEW — NOT RELEASED\",\n+    currentSequence: state.session.currentSequence,\n+    projectedSequence: state.session.currentSequence + 1,\n+    eventType: eventForPreview(input.command),\n+    affectedSystems: affectedSystems(input.command),\n+    undoAvailable: input.command === \"UNDO_LAST\",\n+    prerequisites,\n+    canExecute: prerequisites.length === 0,\n+    snapshot: state,\n+  };\n+  /* Retired Campaign preview implementation retained below for audit only. */\n   const campaign = await db.campaign.findUniqueOrThrow({ where: { slug: input.campaignSlug } });\n*** End Patch";
const r = await tools.apply_patch(patch);text(String(r));

\"@/chronicle/legacy-companion-migration\";\n+import { canonicalReadsEnabled, canonicalWritesEnabled } from \"@/compatibility/project-one-voyage-stage\";\n@@\n export async function resolveLegacyCampaign(campaignSlug: string) {\n+  if (!canonicalReadsEnabled())\n+    throw new LegacyCompatibilityError(\"Canonical compatibility reads are not enabled for this rollout stage.\", \"NOT_MIGRATED\");\n@@\n export async function exchangeLegacyAccessCode(campaignSlug: string, accessCode: string) {\n+  if (!canonicalWritesEnabled())\n+    throw new LegacyCompatibilityError(\"Canonical compatibility writes are not enabled for this rollout stage.\", \"NOT_MIGRATED\");\n*** End Patch";
const r = await tools.apply_patch(patch);text(String(r));

{\r\ndocs\\admin-command-pipeline.md:9:`PREPARE_HINT` preserves staged-command truth: a committed preparation records its prepared action identity, reports process publication as not applicable/not attempted, and can be recovered as the committed staged result. Receipts continue to distinguish committed persistence, process publication, Player delivery, presentation, and acknowledgment; none of the later states is inferred from a successful database transaction.\r\ndocs\\admin-command-pipeline.md:26:Preview follows validation → projected clone → player visibility → consequence summary. It creates no idempotency record, sequence, audit/event row, or SSE publication.\r\ndocs\\architecture.md:21:The Quartermaster bridge requires the `CAPTAIN` capability in addition to its session and CSRF boundary. Commands validate a bounded discriminated payload, reserve the expected campaign sequence with a compare-and-set inside the business transaction, and compare a canonical idempotency fingerprint. Persistence, process publication, delivery, presentation, and acknowledgment remain distinct receipt states; a prepared hint cannot be reported as published merely because staging committed.\r\ndocs\\architecture.md:38:Server Components enforce initial access. Route handlers own authentication, validation, snapshots, and SSE. `src/server/progression.ts` is the transaction boundary; `src/domain/story.ts` owns state rules. The UI receives only a public projection, never database rows. In-memory publish accelerates same-process delivery while database replay by sequence remains authoritative after reconnect/restart.\r\ndocs\\architecture.md:54:The platform extends the Studio/session model rather than copying it. `PlayerProfile`/`PlayerIdentitySession` add durable Player identity; `PlaythroughMembership` is the per-Player authorization and library record; `Invitation`/`InvitationEvent` own single-recipient credential lifecycle; `RevealState` is the historical disclosure ledger; `PlatformRoleAssignment` supplements staff capability scope; and `PlatformAuditEvent` records correlated resource actions. `TaleSession` remains the one playthrough aggregate and retains the exact immutable version relation.\r\ndocs\\animation\\architecture.md:38:The player consumes one SSE connection. Events are sorted through one promise queue, mapped to a registered scene, presented, receipt-checked, conditionally acknowledged, and then reconciled from a fresh server-filtered snapshot. Navigation, page turns, and decorative loops do not create additional event streams.\r\ndocs\\animation\\architecture.md:58:Add the discriminated `kind` and safe fields to `JournalPage` in `src/animation/journal/page-model.ts`, generate a stable ID from public snapshot keys rather than array position, render that kind once in `JournalWorkspace`, and include it in the semantic/reduced page path. Never pass raw database records into the model. Extend the page-model tests for locked-content filtering, stable indices after a snapshot refresh, even spread padding, and chapter navigation; StPageFlip should receive the resulting React HTML through `updateFromHtml`, not a replacement instance.\r\nscripts\\sync_codex_chats.ps1:21:        Write-Error \"Python was not found. Install Python 3.10+ or create .venv at the repository root.\"\r\nscripts\\test-all.ps1:10:    # canonical database boundary. Hold an exclusive OS lock for the entire\r\nscripts\\test-all.ps1:121:    $nodeArguments = @(\"node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs\", \"scripts/prepare-validation-isolation.ts\") + $Arguments\r\nscripts\\test-all.ps1:136:$seedDatabase = Assert-ValidationChildPath -Path (Join-Path $runtimeRoot \"prisma\\validation.db\") -Label \"Validation seed createHash(\"sha256\").update(fs.readFileSync(file)).digest(\"hex\");\r\ndocs\\animation\\performance.md:26:Phase 3 performance evidence runs against the owned optimized server at `http://127.0.0.1:3200` through `playwright.phase3-performance.config.ts`. The integrated harness starts and stops that server, verifies the isolated/canonical database boundary, and releases port 3200. A development-server sample, unit fake clock, or HTTP restart probe does not satisfy this gate.\r\ndocs\\chronicle-platform.md:20:Supported playthrough progression is `DRAFT_SETUP -> INVITING -> READY/SCHEDULED -> ACTIVE <-> PAUSED -> COMPLETED`, with cancellation before launch and abandonment after launch. Memberships move through invited, accepted, ready, active, and completed or terminate as declined/removed. Invitation links and codes move through created/sent/copied/viewed into ready/consumed, or terminate as declined/expired/revoked/replaced. Terminal transitions do not reopen in place.\r\ndocs\\chronicle-platform.md:24:The Captain wizard selects an exact published version, configures progression/hints/side quests/schedule/accessibility, adds one or more Players, chooses PIN/account/lifetime policy, reviews Player-safe content, and creates the playthrough plus all membership/invitation records in one transaction. Each crew member receives a distinct high-entropy link, QR code, human short code, and copyable message. Full secrets are returned only by creation or replacement responses and are never listed again.\r\ndocs\\chronicle-platform.md:26:Link and code resolution is rate-limited. The pending invitation is held in a short-lived HttpOnly SameSite cookie with its own CSRF token. Acceptance atomically claims one redemption, binds or creates the Player identity, readies membership, records invitation/audit events, and readies the playthrough only when no invitation remains pending. Safe retries of an already accepted credential return the existing membership. Expired, declined, revoked, and replaced credentials are rejected before protected content is rendered. Account-required invitations can target only an existing claimed Player and must be accepted while signed into that exact profile.\r\ndocs\\chronicle-platform.md:32:Player projections are allowlists. They contain current Player-safe Tale copy, revealed blocks/assets, crew readiness, and exact edition metadata; accepted answers, Captain instructions, Creator notes, future branches, private variables, storage keys, and raw event payloads are removed. Completed archives are rebuilt from the pinned published snapshot plus visited events/reveal state, not from the current draft or latest release.\r\ndocs\\chronicle-platform.md:42:SQLite migration `20260718020000_chronicle_platform` and MySQL migration `0004_chronicle_platform` are additive. They add platform fields and tables without rebuilding `TaleSession`, so existing IDs, version bindings, event sequences, access hashes, inventory, variables, and timestamps remain intact. The progress-preserving seed path creates missing development Player/staff assignments and backfills only non-preview sessions without memberships. Each gets a placeholder Player membership mapped from the existing session state, a voyage/launch value derived from existing fields, and block reveal records derived from historical `blockEntered` events. It does not reset campaign or Chronicle progress.\r\ndocs\\chronicle-platform.md:44:`scripts/verify-platform-backfill.ts` creates a legacy-shaped proof row in the disposable validation database, runs normal `--ensure`, then proves identity, event, version, membership, reveal, and timestamp preservation. `scripts/verify-database.ts` additionally checks published checksums, scoped development roles, membership coverage, exact version relations, and audit metadata.\r\ndocs\\chronicle-platform.md:46:There is no destructive down migration. Before production migration, back up the database and asset volume and verify restore. Rollback is application rollback plus restoration of that matched backup. The MySQL SQL is maintained for production parity, but a live MySQL integration environment is still required before production rollout.\r\ndocs\\chronicle-platform.md:50:Unit tests cover playthrough/membership/invitation state rules, scoped authorization, and audit redaction. The Chromium mutation journey forks and publishes a Tale, creates and accepts an invitation, denies cross-role access and missing CSRF, launches, publishes a newer edition, proves the live session remains pinned, completes the Tale, validates the exact-version archive, persists pin/hide preferences, proves idempotent acceptance, and verifies replacement/revocation. The reduced-motion responsive gateway and authorization denials also run as a read-only mobile WebKit check. The repository release gate remains `npm run validate`.\r\ndocs\\chronicle-studio.md:8:- `/studio/tales/new` creates a private tale and first chapter.\r\ndocs\\chronicle-studio.md:56:Version History can preview any immutable release, compare two releases with structured added/removed/moved/renamed/access-scope changes, copy a release into a newly numbered draft, or fork it as a separate private Chronicle with explicit provenance. None of those operations mutate a published snapshot or silently retarget active playthroughs. The catalog reports New, In Progress, or Completed/Replayable for compatibility browser sessions; the canonical Player library groups durable identity memberships by invitation, waiting, active, completed, replay/new-edition, and closed state.\r\ndocs\\chronicle-studio.md:64:Assets support display metadata, tags, semantic roles, collections, search/filtering by media/context/role/tag/collection/usage, recent and unused views, lazy thumbnails, paged expansion, drag-to-field assignment, usage lookup, original download, replacement, and guarded archive. A local `TaleAssetStorage` implementation isolates storage operations behind a replaceable interface. Locations support searchable/sortable records, duplicate/edit/archive, used-by counts, player copy, private Captain notes, map/display assets, a reference collection, and a future verification profile. Artifacts provide the parallel searchable/duplicable workflow for lore, ordinary-object labels, artwork/reveal/model assets, inventory categories, and persistence.\r\ndocs\\chronicle-studio.md:80:For a fresh MySQL database, apply the platform script after the three prior domain scripts in the exact order documented in `docs/deployment.md`.\r\ndocs\\chronicle-studio.md:84:Before release, run `npm run validate`. Manually confirm narrow/mobile editor navigation, draft conflict messaging with two windows, published-session pinning after publishing a newer release, asset archive protection, Captain disconnect/reconnect state, and helper rejection cases. Keep `.data/chronicle-assets` or the configured durable asset root backed up alongside the database.\r\ndocs\\animation\\rive-assets.md:35:The runtime reports available inputs to the showcase. Boolean, number, and trigger controls are created from that live list; unknown inputs are never guessed. Reduced motion disables autoplay and uses a stable pose or fallback.\r\nscripts\\validate-project-one-voyage.ts:6:const legacyWriter = /\\b(?:db|tx)\\.(?:campaign|chapter|artifact|artifactAward|sideQuest|sideQuestObjective|progressEvent|campaignSnapshot|playerAccess|adminAuditLog|preparedAction|commandExecution|audioPreference|viewedContent|viewedCeremony|saveStateSnapshot|mapLocation|mapRoute|journalEntry|playerPresence)\\.(?:create|createMany|update|updateMany|upsert|delete|deleteMany)\\b/u;\r\nscripts\\validate-project-one-voyage.ts:44:async function main() {\r\nscripts\\validate-project-one-voyage.ts:54:if (process.argv[1] && path.resolve(process.argv[1]) === path.resolve(new URL(import.meta.url).pathname)) void main();\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

LegacyMigrationReport) {\r\n  const root = await findReference(\"Campaign\", campaign.id, \"Chronicle\");\r\n  const version = await findReference(\"Campaign\", campaign.id, \"PublishedTaleVersion\");\r\n  const session = await findReference(\"Campaign\", campaign.id, \"TaleSession\");\r\n  if (!root || !version || !session) {\r\n    report.failures.push(`Campaign ${campaign.slug} is missing Chronicle, published-version, or session mapping.`);\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n  if (root.sourceChecksum !== campaignChecksum(campaign)) {\r\n    report.checksumMismatches.push(`Campaign ${campaign.slug} source checksum changed after migration.`);\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n  const canonical = await db.chronicle.findUnique({\r\n    where: { id: root.canonicalId },\r\n    include: { drafts: { include: { chapters: { include: { blocks: true } } } }, locations: true, storyArtifacts: true, sideQuests: true },\r\n  });\r\n  const runtime = await db.taleSession.findUnique({ where: { id: session.canonicalId }, include: { events: true, memberships: true } });\r\n  if (!canonical || !runtime || runtime.publishedVersionId !== version.canonicalId) {\r\n    report.failures.push(`Campaign ${campaign.slug} has a broken canonical relation.`);\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n  const draft = canonical.drafts.find((item) => item.revisionNumber === 1);\r\n  const mismatch = (label: string, legacy: number, actual: number) => {\r\n    if (legacy !== actual) report.failures.push(`${campaign.slug}: ${label} mismatch (${legacy} legacy, ${actual} canonical).`);\r\n  };\r\n  mismatch(\"chapters\", campaign.chapters.length, draft?.chapters.length ?? 0);\r\n  mismatch(\"story blocks\", campaign.chapters.length, draft?.chapters.reduce((count, chapter) => count + chapter.blocks.length, 0) ?? 0);\r\n  mismatch(\"artifacts\", campaign.artifacts.length, canonical.storyArtifacts.length);\r\n  mismatch(\"side quests\", campaign.sideQuests.length, canonical.sideQuests.length);\r\n  mismatch(\"locations\", campaign.mapLocations.length, canonical.locations.length);\r\n  mismatch(\"events\", campaign.events.length, runtime.events.length);\r\n  mismatch(\"memberships\", campaign.playerAccesses.length, runtime.memberships.length);\r\n  if (runtime.currentSequence < campaign.currentSequence)\r\n    report.failures.push(`${campaign.slug}: canonical sequence regressed from ${campaign.currentSequence} to ${runtime.currentSequence}.`);\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport async function migrateLegacyCompanion(options: LegacyMigrationOptions = {}): Promise<LegacyMigrationReport> {\r\n  const mode = options.mode ?? \"execute\";\r\n  const report = emptyReport(mode);\r\n  const campaigns = await db.campaign.findMany({\r\n    where: options.campaignSlug ? { slug: options.campaignSlug } : undefined,\r\n    include: legacyCampaignInclude,\r\n    orderBy: { slug: \"asc\" },\r\n  });\r\n  if (options.campaignSlug && !campaigns.length) throw new Error(`No legacy Campaign has slug ${options.campaignSlug}.`);\r\n  report.campaignsInspected = campaigns.length;\r\n  if (mode === \"dry-run\") {\r\n    for (const campaign of campaigns) {\r\n      report.chaptersTranslated += campaign.chapters.length;\r\n      report.storyBlocksCreated += campaign.chapters.length;\r\n      report.artifactsMigrated += campaign.artifacts.length;\r\n      report.sideQuestsMigrated += campaign.sideQuests.length;\r\n      report.locationsMigrated += campaign.mapLocations.length;\r\n      report.routesMigrated += campaign.mapRoutes.length;\r\n      report.eventsMigrated += campaign.events.length;\r\n      report.playersMigrated += campaign.playerAccesses.length;\r\n      report.membershipsMigrated += campaign.playerAccesses.length;\r\n      report.auditRecordsMigrated += campaign.auditLogs.length + campaign.preparedActions.length + campaign.commandExecutions.length;\r\n    }\r\n    return report;\r\n  }\r\n  if (mode === \"verify\") {\r\n    for (const campaign of campaigns) await verifyCampaign(campaign, report);\r\n    return report;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const run = await db.legacyMigrationRun.create({\r\n    data: {\r\n      migrationVersion: LEGACY_COMPANION_MIGRATION_VERSION,\r\n      mode,\r\n      status: \"RUNNING\",\r\n      sourceSelector: options.campaignSlug ?? null,\r\n    },\r\n  });\r\n  for (const campaign of campaigns) {\r\n    try {\r\n      await migrateCampaign(campaign, report);\r\n    } catch (error) {\r\n      const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : \"Unknown migration failure.\";\r\n      report.failures.push(message);\r\n      if (options.failFast ?? true) break;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n  await db.legacyMigrationRun.update({\r\n    where: { id: run.id },\r\n    data: {\r\n      status: report.failures.length ? \"FAILED\" : \"COMPLETED\",\r\n      report: JSON.stringify({ ...report, warnings: report.warnings.slice(0, 100), failures: report.failures.slice(0, 100) }),\r\n      completedAt: new Date(),\r\n    },\r\n  });\r\n  return report;\r\n}\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

type { AdminCommand } from \"@/domain/admin\";\r\nimport { db } from \"@/lib/db\";\r\nimport { publishTaleSessionEvent } from \"@/lib/events\";\r\nimport { parseJsonArray, parseJsonObject, parsePublishedSnapshot, type JsonObject } from \"@/chronicle/types\";\r\nimport { resolveLegacyCampaign } from \"@/compatibility/legacy-companion\";\r\n\r\nexport class LegacyQuartermasterConflict extends Error {\r\n  constructor(\r\n    message: string,\r\n    public readonly code: \"STALE_SEQUENCE\" | \"SESSION_PAUSED\" | \"NOT_FOUND\" | \"UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND\",\r\n  ) {\r\n    super(message);\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\ntype LegacyCommandInput = {\r\n  command: AdminCommand;\r\n  campaignSlug: string;\r\n  expectedSequence: number;\r\n  idempotencyKey: string;\r\n  targetKey?: string;\r\n  payload: Record<string, unknown>;\r\n  reason?: string;\r\n};\r\n\r\ntype LegacyVariables = JsonObject & {\r\n  legacy?: JsonObject & { chapters?: Record<string, string>; sideQuests?: Record<string, JsonObject>; routes?: Record<string, string> };\r\n};\r\n\r\nconst eventTypeFor: Partial<Record<AdminCommand, string>> = {\r\n  PREPARE_CHAPTER: \"CHAPTER_PREPARED\",\r\n  RELEASE_CHAPTER: \"CHAPTER_RELEASED\",\r\n  MARK_SOLVED: \"CHAPTER_SOLVED\",\r\n  COMPLETE_CHAPTER: \"CHAPTER_REVEAL_COMPLETED\",\r\n  RELEASE_HINT: \"HINT_RELEASED\",\r\n  RELEASE_NEXT_HINT: \"HINT_RELEASED\",\r\n  REVEAL_MAP: \"MAP_LOCATION_REVEALED\",\r\n  REVEAL_ROUTE: \"MAP_ROUTE_REVEALED\",\r\n  AWARD_ARTIFACT: \"ARTIFACT_AWARDED\",\r\n  REVEAL_ARTIFACT_SILHOUETTE: \"ARTIFACT_SILHOUETTE_REVEALED\",\r\n  CONNECT_ARTIFACTS: \"ARTIFACT_CONNECTED\",\r\n  DISCOVER_SIDE_QUEST: \"SIDE_QUEST_DISCOVERED\",\r\n  UPDATE_SIDE_QUEST: \"SIDE_QUEST_UPDATED\",\r\n  COMPLETE_SIDE_QUEST: \"SIDE_QUEST_COMPLETED\",\r\n  ADVANCE_SIDE_QUEST: \"SIDE_QUEST_UPDATED\",\r\n  ADD_JOURNAL_ANNOTATION: \"JOURNAL_ANNOTATION_ADDED\",\r\n  ADD_LOG_ENTRY: \"PLAYER_LOG_ENTRY_ADDED\",\r\n  RELEASE_JOURNAL_ENTRY: \"NARRATIVE_MESSAGE_RELEASED\",\r\n  TEASE_FINALE: \"FINALE_TEASED\",\r\n  UPDATE_FINALE_REQUIREMENT: \"FINALE_REQUIREMENT_UPDATED\",\r\n  PAUSE: \"CAMPAIGN_PAUSED\",\r\n  RESUME: \"CAMPAIGN_RESUMED\",\r\n  REQUEST_RECONCILIATION: \"PLAYER_RECONCILIATION_REQUESTED\",\r\n};\r\n\r\nfunction legacyState(raw: string): LegacyVariables {\r\n  const parsed = parseJsonObject(raw) as LegacyVariables;\r\n  const legacy = (parsed.legacy ?? {}) as JsonObject;\r\n  parsed.legacy = legacy;\r\n  if (!legacy.chapters || typeof legacy.chapters !== \"object\" || Array.isArray(legacy.chapters)) legacy.chapters = {};\r\n  if (!legacy.sideQuests || typeof legacy.sideQuests !== \"object\" || Array.isArray(legacy.sideQuests)) legacy.sideQuests = {};\r\n  if (!legacy.routes || typeof legacy.routes !== \"object\" || Array.isArray(legacy.routes)) legacy.routes = {};\r\n  return parsed;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction chapterForCommand(snapshot: ReturnType<typeof parsePublishedSnapshot>, variables: LegacyVariables, command: AdminCommand) {\r\n  const chapters = (variables.legacy?.chapters ?? {}) as Record<string, string>;\r\n  if (command === \"PREPARE_CHAPTER\")\r\n    return snapshot.chapters.find((chapter) => [\"LOCKED\", \"TEASER\"].includes(chapters[String(chapter.orderIndex)] ?? \"LOCKED\"));\r\n  if (command === \"RELEASE_CHAPTER\")\r\n    return snapshot.chapters.find((chapter) => (chapters[String(chapter.orderIndex)] ?? \"LOCKED\") === \"READY\");\r\n  return [...snapshot.chapters]\r\n    .reverse()\r\n    .find((chapter) => [\"ACTIVE\", \"SOLVED\", \"COMPLETE\"].includes(chapters[String(chapter.orderIndex)] ?? \"LOCKED\"));\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction receipt(event: { id: string; eventType: string; sequence: number; createdAt: Date }, correlationId: string) {\r\n  return {\r\n    kind: \"PROGRESSION_EVENT\" as const,\r\n    event: {\r\n      id: event.id,\r\n      type: event.eventType,\r\n      sequence: event.sequence,\r\n      payload: {},\r\n      releaseAt: event.createdAt.toISOString(),\r\n    },\r\n    correlationId,\r\n    persistence: \"COMMITTED\" as const,\r\n    publication: \"PROCESS_PUBLISHED\" as const,\r\n    delivery: \"PUBLISHED\" as const,\r\n    deliveryScope: \"PROCESS_SUBSCRIBERS_ONLY\" as const,\r\n    playerDelivery: \"UNCONFIRMED\" as const,\r\n    playerPresentation: \"UNCONFIRMED\" as const,\r\n    playerAcknowledgment: \"UNCONFIRMED\" as const,\r\n    playerEvent: { id: event.id, type: event.eventType, sequence: event.sequence },\r\n  };\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Adapter for Quartermaster request shapes. It resolves the historical Campaign\r\n * only as an ID lookup; all decisions, sequence increments, events, reveals,\r\n * inventory and audit writes are canonical Chronicle-session writes.\r\n */\r\nexport async function executeLegacyQuartermasterCommand(\r\n  input: LegacyCommandInput,\r\n  userId: string,\r\n  correlationId = randomUUID(),\r\n) {\r\n  const resolved = await resolveLegacyCampaign(input.campaignSlug);\r\n  if (!resolved) throw new LegacyQuartermasterConflict(\"This Voyage is unavailable.\", \"NOT_FOUND\");\r\n  const key = `legacy-quartermaster:${resolved.sessionId}:${input.idempotencyKey}`;\r\n  const event = await db.$transaction(async (tx) => {\r\n    const prior = await tx.taleSessionEvent.findUnique({ where: { idempotencyKey: key } });\r\n    if (prior) return prior;\r\n    const session = await tx.taleSession.findUniqueOrThrow({ where: { id: resolved.sessionId }, include: { version: true } });\r\n    if (session.currentSequence !== input.expectedSequence)\r\n      throw new LegacyQuartermasterConflict(\r\n        `Chronicle state changed from sequence ${input.expectedSequence} to ${session.currentSequence}. Refresh Captain's Console.`,\r\n        \"STALE_SEQUENCE\",\r\n      );\r\n    if (session.status === \"PAUSED\" && ![\"RESUME\", \"REQUEST_RECONCILIATION\"].includes(input.command))\r\n      throw new LegacyQuartermasterConflict(\"This Chronicle Session is paused. Resume it before releasing progression.\", \"SESSION_PAUSED\");\r\n    const type = eventTypeFor[input.command];\r\n    if (!type || input.command === \"UNDO_LAST\")\r\n      throw new LegacyQuartermasterConflict(\r\n        \"This historical command requires the canonical Captain rollback control.\",\r\n        \"UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND\",\r\n      );\r\n    if (!session.version) throw new LegacyQuartermasterConflict(\"This Chronicle Session has no published version.\", \"NOT_FOUND\");\r\n    const snapshot = parsePublishedSnapshot(session.version.contentSnapshot);\r\n    const variables = legacyState(session.variables);\r\n    const inventory = parseJsonArray<string>(session.inventory);\r\n    let currentBlockId = session.currentBlockId;\r\n    let currentChapterId = session.currentChapterId;\r\n    let status = session.status;\r\n    let reveal: { contentType: string; contentKey: string } | null = null;\r\n    const payload: JsonObject = { command: input.command, targetKey: input.targetKey ?? null };\r\n    const chapter = chapterForCommand(snapshot, variables, input.command);\r\n\r\n    if ([\"PREPARE_CHAPTER\", \"RELEASE_CHAPTER\", \"MARK_SOLVED\", \"COMPLETE_CHAPTER\"].includes(input.command)) {\r\n      if (!chapter) throw new LegacyQuartermasterConflict(\"No matching imported Chapter is available.\", \"NOT_FOUND\");\r\n      const state =\r\n        input.command === \"PREPARE_CHAPTER\"\r\n          ? \"READY\"\r\n          : input.command === \"RELEASE_CHAPTER\"\r\n            ? \"ACTIVE\"\r\n            : input.command === \"MARK_SOLVED\"\r\n              ? \"SOLVED\"\r\n              : \"COMPLETE\";\r\n      (variables.legacy!.chapters as Record<string, string>)[String(chapter.orderIndex)] = state;\r\n      if (input.command === \"RELEASE_CHAPTER\") {\r\n        currentChapterId = chapter.id;\r\n        currentBlockId = chapter.entryBlockId;\r\n        if (chapter.entryBlockId) reveal = { contentType: \"BLOCK\", contentKey: chapter.entryBlockId };\r\n      }\r\n      payload.chapterId = chapter.id;\r\n      payload.chapterState = state;\r\n    } else if (input.command === \"PAUSE\" || input.command === \"RESUME\") {\r\n      status = input.command === \"PAUSE\" ? \"PAUSED\" : \"ACTIVE\";\r\n    } else if (input.command === \"REVEAL_MAP\" || input.command === \"REVEAL_ROUTE\") {\r\n      const contentKey = input.targetKey ?? \"default\";\r\n      reveal = { contentType: input.command === \"REVEAL_MAP\" ? \"map-location\" : \"map-route\", contentKey };\r\n      if (input.command === \"REVEAL_ROUTE\") (variables.legacy!.routes as Record<string, string>)[contentKey] = \"REVEALED\";\r\n    } else if ([\"AWARD_ARTIFACT\", \"REVEAL_ARTIFACT_SILHOUETTE\", \"CONNECT_ARTIFACTS\"].includes(input.command)) {\r\n      const artifact = await tx.taleArtifact.findFirst({\r\n        where: { taleId: session.taleId, ...(input.targetKey ? { legacyKey: input.targetKey } : {}) },\r\n        orderBy: { sortOrder: \"asc\" },\r\n      });\r\n      if (!artifact) throw new LegacyQuartermasterConflict(\"No mapped Artifact is available.\", \"NOT_FOUND\");\r\n      reveal = { contentType: \"artifact\", contentKey: artifact.legacyKey ?? artifact.id };\r\n      if (input.command === \"AWARD_ARTIFACT\" && !inventory.includes(artifact.id)) inventory.push(artifact.id);\r\n      payload.artifactId = artifact.id;\r\n    } else if ([\"DISCOVER_SIDE_QUEST\", \"UPDATE_SIDE_QUEST\", \"COMPLETE_SIDE_QUEST\", \"ADVANCE_SIDE_QUEST\"].includes(input.command)) {\r\n      const quest = await tx.taleSideQuest.findFirst({\r\n        where: { taleId: session.taleId, ...(input.targetKey ? { legacyKey: input.targetKey } : {}) },\r\n        orderBy: { legacyKey: \"asc\" },\r\n      });\r\n      if (!quest) throw new LegacyQuartermasterConflict(\"No mapped side quest is available.\", \"NOT_FOUND\");\r\n      const questState =\r\n        input.command === \"DISCOVER_SIDE_QUEST\"\r\n          ? \"DISCOVERED\"\r\n          : input.command === \"COMPLETE_SIDE_QUEST\"\r\n            ? \"COMPLETE\"\r\n            : \"ACTIVE\";\r\n      (variables.legacy!.sideQuests as Record<string, JsonObject>)[quest.legacyKey] = { state: questState };\r\n      reveal = { contentType: \"side-quest\", contentKey: quest.legacyKey };\r\n      payload.sideQuestKey = quest.legacyKey;\r\n      payload.sideQuestState = questState;\r\n    } else if (input.command === \"TEASE_FINALE\" || input.command === \"UPDATE_FINALE_REQUIREMENT\") {\r\n      variables.legacy = { ...variables.legacy, finaleState: input.command === \"TEASE_FINALE\" ? \"TEASED\" : \"REQUIREMENTS_PARTIAL\" };\r\n    } else if (input.command === \"ADD_JOURNAL_ANNOTATION\" || input.command === \"ADD_LOG_ENTRY\" || input.command === \"RELEASE_JOURNAL_ENTRY\") {\r\n      payload.value = typeof input.payload.value === \"string\" ? input.payload.value : null;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    const guarded = await tx.taleSession.updateMany({\r\n      where: { id: session.id, currentSequence: input.expectedSequence },\r\n      data: {\r\n        currentSequence: { increment: 1 },\r\n        status,\r\n        currentBlockId,\r\n        currentChapterId,\r\n        variables: JSON.stringify(variables),\r\n        inventory: JSON.stringify(inventory),\r\n      },\r\n    });\r\n    if (guarded.count !== 1)\r\n      throw new LegacyQuartermasterConflict(\"Another Captain command was saved first. Refresh before retrying.\", \"STALE_SEQUENCE\");\r\n    const updated = await tx.taleSession.findUniqueOrThrow({ where: { id: session.id }, select: { currentSequence: true } });\r\n    if (reveal)\r\n      await tx.revealState.upsert({\r\n        where: { playthroughId_contentType_contentKey: { playthroughId: session.id, ...reveal } },\r\n        update: {},\r\n        create: { playthroughId: session.id, ...reveal, revealedBy: userId },\r\n      });\r\n    const created = await tx.taleSessionEvent.create({\r\n      data: {\r\n        sessionId: session.id,\r\n        publishedVersionId: session.publishedVersionId!,\r\n        blockId: currentBlockId,\r\n        eventType: type,\r\n        sourceType: \"legacy-quartermaster-adapter\",\r\n        sourceId: userId,\r\n        idempotencyKey: key,\r\n        payload: JSON.stringify(payload),\r\n        sequence: updated.currentSequence,\r\n        correlationId,\r\n      },\r\n    });\r\n    await tx.platformAuditEvent.create({\r\n      data: {\r\n        actorType: \"CAPTAIN\",\r\n        actorId: userId,\r\n        action: `LEGACY_QUARTERMASTER_${input.command}`,\r\n        resourceType: \"CHRONICLE_SESSION\",\r\n        resourceId: session.id,\r\n        correlationId,\r\n        metadata: JSON.stringify({ adapter: \"legacy-quartermaster\", targetKey: input.targetKey ?? null }),\r\n      },\r\n    });\r\n    return created;\r\n  });\r\n  publishTaleSessionEvent(resolved.sessionId, {\r\n    id: event.id,\r\n    eventType: event.eventType,\r\n    sequence: event.sequence,\r\n    createdAt: event.createdAt.toISOString(),\r\n  });\r\n  return receipt(event, correlationId);\r\n}\r\n--- TYPES EXPORTS ---\r\n74:export type PublishedBlock = StudioBlockInput & {\n87:export type PublishedChapter = Omit<StudioChapterInput, \"blocks\"> & {\n94:export type PublishedTaleSnapshot = {\n--- EVENT ROUTE ---\r\nimport { eventBus } from \"@/lib/events\";\r\nimport { db } from \"@/lib/db\";\r\nimport { requireLegacyCompatibilityAccess } from \"@/compatibility/legacy-companion\";\r\n\r\nexport const dynamic = \"force-dynamic\";\r\n\r\nfunction cursor(request: Request) {\r\n  const raw = request.headers.get(\"last-event-id\") ?? new URL(request.url).searchParams.get(\"after\") ?? \"0\";\r\n  return /^\\d+$/u.test(raw) ? Number(raw) : 0;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction playerEvent(event: { id: string; eventType: string; sequence: number; payload: string; createdAt: Date }) {\r\n  let payload: Record<string, unknown> = {};\r\n  try {\r\n    const parsed: unknown = JSON.parse(event.payload);\r\n    if (parsed && typeof parsed === \"object\" && !Array.isArray(parsed)) payload = parsed as Record<string, unknown>;\r\n  } catch {}\r\n  return { id: event.id, type: event.eventType, sequence: event.sequence, payload, releaseAt: event.createdAt.toISOString() };\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport async function GET(request: Request, context: { params: Promise<{ campaignSlug: string }> }) {\r\n  const access = await requireLegacyCompatibilityAccess((await context.params).campaignSlug);\r\n  if (!access) return new Response(\"Invitation required.\", { status: 401 });\r\n  const requested = cursor(request);\r\n  const encoder = new TextEncoder();\r\n  let close = () => undefined;\r\n  const stream = new ReadableStream({\r\n    async start(controller) {\r\n      let last = requested;\r\n      const send = (event: { id: string; eventType: string; sequence: number; payload: string; createdAt: Date }) => {\r\n        if (event.sequence <= last) return;\r\n        last = event.sequence;\r\n        controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(`id: ${event.sequence}\\nevent: progression\\ndata: ${JSON.stringify(playerEvent(event))}\\n\\n`));\r\n      };\r\n      const historical = await db.taleSessionEvent.findMany({\r\n        where: { sessionId: access.sessionId, sequence: { gt: requested } },\r\n        orderBy: { sequence: \"asc\" },\r\n        take: 250,\r\n      });\r\n      for (const event of historical) send(event);\r\n      const channel = `tale-session:${access.sessionId}`;\r\n      const listener = async (incoming: { id: string; eventType: string; sequence: number; createdAt: string }) => {\r\n        const event = await db.taleSessionEvent.findUnique({ where: { id: incoming.id } });\r\n        if (event) send(event);\r\n      };\r\n      eventBus.on(channel, listener);\r\n      const heartbeat = setInterval(() => controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(\": tide connected\\n\\n\")), 15_000);\r\n      close = () => {\r\n        clearInterval(heartbeat);\r\n        eventBus.off(channel, listener);\r\n        try {\r\n          controller.close();\r\n        } catch {}\r\n      };\r\n      request.signal.addEventListener(\"abort\", close, { once: true });\r\n    },\r\n    cancel() {\r\n      close();\r\n    },\r\n  });\r\n  return new Response(stream, {\r\n    headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"text/event-stream\", \"Cache-Control\": \"no-cache, no-transform\", Connection: \"keep-alive\" },\r\n  });\r\n}\r\n--- TEST <= PLAYER_EVENT_DEDUPE_WINDOW_SIZE) return;\r\n          const evicted = deliveredOrder.shift();\r\n          if (evicted) delivered.delete(evicted);\r\n        };\r\n        const send = (event: receive(event: ClientProgressEvent) {\r\n          if (phase === \"closed\" || event.sequence <= lastSuccessfullyDeliveredSequence || delivered.has(event.id)) {\r\n            return;\r\n terminate(true);\r\n        }\r\n        const accessIsCurrent = async () =>\r\n          Boolean(\r\n            await db.playerAccess.findFirst({\r\n              where: {\r\n                id: access.id,\r\n                campaignId: access.campaignId,\r\n                OR: [{ expiresAt: null }, { expiresAt: { gt: new Date() } }],\r\n              },\r\n              select: { id: true },\r\n            }),\r\n          );\r\n        const revoke = () => {\r\n          if (isClosed()) return;\r\n          enqueue(\"event: access-revoked\\ndata: {}\\n\\n\");\r\n          terminate(true);\r\n        };\r\n\r\n        // Subscribe before querying durable history. right.sequence || left.id.localeCompare(right.id));\r\n            for (const event of page) {\r\n              if (!send(event)) return;\r\n              buffered.delete(event.id);\r\n              durableCursor = Math.max(durableCursor, event.sequence);\r\n            }\r\n            if (durableCursor <= previousCursor) {\r\n              terminate(true);\r\n              return;\r\n            }\r\n            if (missed.length < PLAYER_EVENT_HISTORY_PAGE_SIZE) break;\r\n          }\r\n\r\n          const liveOverlap = [...buffered.values()].sort(\r\n            (left, right) => left.sequence -
